ZoneConfig.description: An irrigation zone's runtime-mutable configuration (controller spec §4, §6).

moisture_low_threshold.description: Irrigation triggers below this soil moisture (VWC, 0–1).

moisture_high_threshold.description: Irrigation stops above this soil moisture (VWC, 0–1). Must be above moisture_low_threshold.

drain_period_secs.description: Minimum gap between irrigation cycles, to prevent root saturation (seconds).

ZoneConfigPatch.description: Partial update of a zone's config — any subset of ZoneConfig fields. Cross-field invariants (moisture_low_threshold < moisture_high_threshold) are enforced by the controller and surface as 422.

ZoneStatus.description: An irrigation zone's configuration plus its live state.

soil_moisture_vwc.description: Latest soil-moisture reading (VWC, 0–1), or null when the zone's sensor is faulted/unavailable.

irrigating.description: Whether the zone's irrigation valve is currently open.

faulted.description: True when this zone's irrigation is disabled by a fault (controller spec §7, §8).

last_cycle_ts.description: End of the most recent irrigation cycle (RFC 3339 UTC, ms), or null if none yet.
